title: Docent Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Docent Zig documentation linter.

paths.description: Source paths to lint. Defaults to the library entrypoints discovered from build.zig.

profile.description: Lint profile to use as the baseline rule set.

categories.description: Enable or disable entire rule categories.

rules.description: Per-rule configuration. Each key is a rule identifier.

missing_doc_comment.description: Warns when a public declaration is missing a doc comment.

missing_ending_punctuation.description: Warns when the summary paragraph of a doc comment does not end with terminal punctuation.

scope.description: Whether to check only the first (summary) paragraph or every prose paragraph.

accepted_marks.description: Set of accepted terminal punctuation characters.

starts_with_module.description: Warns when a module entry-point doc comment does not start with a canonical module leading phrase.

allow_library_kind.description: Allow 'Library' as an alternative kind for module entrypoints that expose no reserved entry points.

require_backticks.description: Require the module name to be wrapped in backticks when following an article.

case_insensitive.description: Allow the module name check to be case insensitive.

starts_with_identifier.description: Warns when a public declaration's doc comment does not start with the declaration's identifier.

mode.description: How strictly the leading phrase is validated.

require_article.description: Require an English article (a, an, the) before the identifier.

require_backticks.description: Require the identifier to be wrapped in backticks.

require_kind.description: Require a kind word (function, struct, enum, etc.) in the leading phrase.

allow_kind_before_identifier.description: Allow the kind word to appear before the identifier.

allow_kind_after_identifier.description: Allow the kind word to appear after the identifier.

allowed_decl_kinds.description: Accepted identifier kind words for declarations.

function_size.description: Warns when a function exceeds the configured true physical LoC threshold.

max_lines.description: Maximum number of physical true LoC (excluding comments, blank lines, braces, and the declaration line).

cyclomatic_complexity.description: Warns when the cyclomatic complexity of a function exceeds the threshold.

max_complexity.description: Maximum allowed cyclomatic complexity per function.

cognitive_complexity.description: Warns when the cognitive complexity of a function exceeds the threshold.

max_complexity.description: Maximum allowed cognitive complexity per function.

exclusions.description: Path-based exclusion rules. Applied before analysis; diagnostic origin is used for file-level suppression.

path.description: Glob pattern relative to the project root.

rules.description: Specific rules to suppress for matching paths. If omitted alongside 'all: true', all rules are suppressed.

all.description: Suppress all rules for matching paths.
